name: Designated reference benchmark alignment (where applicable)

regulatory_anchors.article: Article 9(1) (where a reference benchmark is designated, alignment with sustainable investment objective); Article 9(3) (carbon-reduction objective Climate Transition / Paris-Aligned benchmark route)

summary: Where the product designates a reference benchmark, tests whether the designated benchmark is aligned with the sustainable investment objective declared under Article 9(1), or (for carbon-reduction objectives) is an EU Climate Transition Benchmark or EU Paris-Aligned Benchmark under Article 9(3). If no benchmark is designated, this criterion is not applicable and contributes no signal.
successor_regime_note: Under proposed SFDR 2.0 (Commission proposal COM(2025) 841, tabled 2025), the reference-benchmark route is expected to be retained as one option among several for evidencing the sustainable investment objective. PB Art 9 verdicts issued under methodology v3.3 are stamped to SFDR v1 (Reg 2019/2088 as consolidated 09/01/2024) and remain valid as of date of issue.
